title: Furnace Extract
description: Extract items in a furnace by right clicking and crouching
body:
# Furnace Extract
Extract items from a furnace easily by crouching and right clicking, like seen in the video!

This works on smokers and blast furnaces as well.

![Preview](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbnc3ZnFvNTQ4bDhscGUwbXF1bTA5amRnN2VwaXdld3dqZzViYTlqMSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0ki1zbfp1yVLnfzeiA/giphy.gif)

### Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
